name: LG HelloVision Corp.
summary: LG HelloVision Corp. home connectivity solutions in South Korea. It offers broadcasting and communication technologies, such as digital cable TV, UHD broadcasting, giga Internet, and cloud broadcasting services; high-speed Internet services; telephone services; mobile services; and rental of home appliances, TVs, PCs, and laptops. The company was formerly known as CJ Hello Co., Ltd. and changed its name to LG HelloVision Corp. in December 2019. LG HelloVision Corp. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
